debug_info.goal:
r : backend.serial.u64.field.FieldElement51
h_bounds : ∀ i < 5, ↑r[i]! < 2 ^ 54
⊢ ∃ r',
    invert r = ok r' ∧
      let r_nat := Field51_as_Nat r % p;
      let r'_nat := Field51_as_Nat r' % p;
      (r_nat ≠ 0 → r'_nat * r_nat % p = 1) ∧ (r_nat = 0 → r'_nat = 0) ∧ ∀ i < 5, ↑r'[i]! < 2 ^ 52

failed_attempts:
-- Step 1: Apply pow22501 spec
    obtain ⟨t19, t3, h_pow22501, h_t19_mod, h_t3_mod, h_t19_bounds, h_t3_bounds⟩ :=
      pow22501_spec r h_bounds
    -- Step 2: Apply pow2k spec (t19 has limbs < 2^52 < 2^54)
    have h_t19_bounds' : ∀ i < 5, (t19[i]!).val < 2 ^ 54 := by
      intro i hi; exact Nat.lt_trans (h_t19_bounds i hi) (by norm_num)
    obtain ⟨t20, h_pow2k, h_t20_mod, h_t20_bounds⟩ :=
      backend.serial.u64.field.FieldElement51.pow2k_spec t19 5#u32 (by omega) h_t19_bounds'
    -- Step 3: Apply mul spec (t20, t3 have limbs < 2^52 < 2^54)
    have h_t20_bounds' : ∀ i < 5, (t20[i]!).val < 2 ^ 54 := by
      intro i hi; exact Nat.lt_trans (h_t20_bounds i hi) (by norm_num)
    have h_t3_bounds' : ∀ i < 5, (t3[i]!).val < 2 ^ 54 := by
      intro i hi; exact Nat.lt_trans (h_t3_bounds i hi) (by norm_num)
    obtain ⟨r', h_mul, h_r'_mod, h_r'_bounds⟩ :=
      backend.serial.u64.field.FieldElement51.Mul.mul_spec t20 t3 h_t20_bounds' h_t3_bounds'
    -- Establish r' ≡ r^(p-2) (mod p)
    have h_r'_pow : Field51_as_Nat r' % p = (Field51_as_Nat r ^ (p - 2)) % p :=
      r'_congruence (Field51_as_Nat r) (Field51_as_Nat t19) (Field51_as_Nat t3)
        (Field51_as_Nat t20) (Field51_as_Nat r')
        h_t19_mod h_t3_mod h_t20_mod h_r'_mod
    -- Construct the result
    refine ⟨r', ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
    -- invert r = ok r'
    · simp [invert, h_pow22501, h_pow2k, h_mul]
    -- Inverse property: r' * r ≡ 1 (mod p) when r ≠ 0
    · intro hr_ne
      rw [h_r'_pow]
      exact fermat_inverse (Field51_as_Nat r) hr_ne
    -- Zero property: r ≡ 0 → r' ≡ 0
    · intro hr_zero
      rw [h_r'_pow]
      exact zero_pow_mod (Field51_as_Nat r) hr_zero (p - 2) (by unfold p; omega)
    -- Bounds
    · exact h_r'_bounds
